global_requirements.requirement: Cada sección tiene exactamente 4 temas evaluables
global_requirements.acceptance_test: Contar temas en blueprint de S02 = 4
global_requirements.evidence: V3 roadmap S02 define T1–T4: Valores, Nombres, Operadores, I/O. Contenido actual no está estructurado como 4 temas V3.

global_requirements.requirement: Cada tema tiene exactamente 2 subtemas evaluables
global_requirements.acceptance_test: Contar subtemas en blueprint de S02 = 8 (4×2)
global_requirements.evidence: Current content has 6 learningOutcomes (variables/types, casting, conditionals, loops, functions, comprehensions), not 4×2 V3 subtopics.

global_requirements.requirement: Cada subtema tiene 1 demo I Do y 3 ejercicios del estudiante
global_requirements.evidence: Current S02 has 3 iDo steps + 2 weDo steps; theory has 5 code demos embedded. Far below 8 demos + 24 exercises.

global_requirements.requirement: Cada subtema tiene 3 variantes de examen A/B/C
global_requirements.evidence: Seed basics has 12 questions across 4 concepts (assign-vs-compare, list-comprehension, truthiness, kwargs).

global_requirements.requirement: Cada sección tiene evaluación por tema, examen acumulativo y proyecto
global_requirements.acceptance_test: 4 topic evaluations + 1 section exam + 1 project increment for S02
global_requirements.evidence: selfCheck (5 Q) + youDo project exist. Missing 4 topic evaluations.

global_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido de S02 en español peruano sin caricaturas
global_requirements.evidence: Existing content uses español peruano (soles, María Quispe, propinas). Keep for rewrites.

global_requirements.acceptance_test: S02 no afirma parentesco por coincidencia de nombres en intake
global_requirements.evidence: S02 intake parser is capture/normalize only; ER is later. Gate: preserve original field values, not score kinship.

global_requirements.requirement: Todo código debe ejecutarse o marcarse UNVERIFIED
global_requirements.acceptance_test: Código de S02 ejecutado en entorno declarado (browser/local)
global_requirements.evidence: Existing demos have expected outputs; V3 rewrites must re-verify or mark UNVERIFIED.

global_requirements.acceptance_test: S02 usa registros de cliente sintéticos sin PII real
global_requirements.evidence: Maria Quispe / synthetic patterns; V3 gate requires synthetic client record.

section_requirements.requirement: S02 cubre T1 Valores: literales y tipos; inspección, conversión y validación explícita
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido enseña literales int/float/str/bool, type/isinstance, cast y validación antes de usar
section_requirements.evidence: Theory block 1 covers types, type(), isinstance, casting, f-strings. Missing: validation patterns, explicit fail-on-bad-cast, None handling depth.

section_requirements.requirement: S02 cubre T2 Nombres: asignación y convenciones; identidad, mutabilidad y copias al nivel necesario
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido enseña snake_case/PEP8, = vs binding, id/is, mutable vs immutable, copia superficial
section_requirements.evidence: snake_case mentioned; assignment exists. Missing: id(), is/is not, mutability demo, copy/slice shallow copy.

section_requirements.requirement: S02 cubre T3 Operadores: aritmética, comparación y precedencia; dinero, Decimal, precisión y redondeo
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido enseña + - * / // % **, comparaciones, precedencia, Decimal para dinero, quantize/redondeo
section_requirements.evidence: Operators appear only inside conditionals/examples. No Decimal module. No money precision teaching. Float used for soles (propinas).

section_requirements.requirement: S02 cubre T4 I/O: input, print y f-strings; parsing, mensajes de error y ejemplos comprobables
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido enseña input/print/f-strings, parse de campos, mensajes accionables, tests de casos límite
section_requirements.evidence: youDo uses input(); f-strings in theory. Missing: structured parsing of multi-field client record, empty/Unicode/invalid number test suite.

section_requirements.requirement: S02 incremento/gate: capturar registro sintético de cliente (nombres, dos apellidos, contacto, dirección) sin perder valor original; vacíos, Unicode y número inválido pasan pruebas
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Parser produces dict/structure with raw original + parsed fields; tests: empty, Unicode, invalid number
section_requirements.evidence: youDo is Personal Budget Calculator — unrelated to intake parser. Capstone CP-N1-A needs intake increment at S02.

section_requirements.requirement: S02 examen verifica habilidades de valores/tipos/nombres/operadores/I-O (no loops/funciones/comprehensions como foco principal)
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Exam bank concepts map to 8 S02 subtopics
section_requirements.evidence: Seed concepts list-comprehension, kwargs, truthiness belong largely to S03/S04 V3; assign-vs-compare partially maps to T2/T3.

section_requirements.acceptance_test: Demos ejecutan en browser-pyodide y/o local-python; Decimal es stdlib (ok en ambos)
section_requirements.evidence: V3 declares browser/local. Pure Python + decimal stdlib fits pyodide.

section_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido asume intérprete/entorno listo; no re-enseña setup
section_requirements.evidence: S02 assumes S01 completed. Parallel lane may author while S01 incomplete; release gate still requires S01.

section_requirements.requirement: Proyecto alineado a parser de intake (CP-N1-A path)
section_requirements.source: V3 S02 project + S01–S04 capstone chain
section_requirements.acceptance_test: You Do / project increment is intake field capture, not budget calculator
section_requirements.evidence: Current youDo = Personal Budget Calculator. Must remapp to intake parser increment.

platform_requirements.requirement: S02 carga sin errores en la plataforma
platform_requirements.evidence: s02-basics.ts exports section02 with id basics; historically shipped.

platform_requirements.source: V3 counting + platform notes from S01
platform_requirements.acceptance_test: Blueprint documents platform gap for 8 demos
platform_requirements.evidence: Same gap as S01: CourseSection model lacks subtopic demos array.

platform_requirements.requirement: Banco de examen section_id basics expandible a 8 conceptos

contradictions_detected.issue: V3 S02 is 'Valores, tipos, operadores e I/O' (intake parser). Existing s02-basics.ts is 'Python Absolute Basics' covering variables, conditionals, loops, functions, comprehensions — a V2 mega-section that overlaps S03/S04 V3 scope.
contradictions_detected.resolution: Platform title may stay short ('Basics de Python') but theory/outcomes/project MUST re-scope to V3 T1–T4 only. Move conditionals/loops/functions/comprehensions out of S02 learning outcomes into S03/S04 ownership. Keep reusable code snippets only where they serve values/I-O demos.
contradictions_detected.authority: learning_roadmap_52_V3.md is primary for S02 scope; learning_roadmap.md/platform title secondary for branding.
contradictions_detected.impact: Blocks PHASE 4 full rewrite until blueprint locks 4×2. Does not block PHASE 0–3 research/blueprint.

contradictions_detected.issue: V3 project gate is intake client record parser. Existing youDo is Personal Budget Calculator.
contradictions_detected.resolution: Blueprint project_increment = intake parser (nombres, apellido_paterno, apellido_materno, contacto, dirección; preserve raw; empty/Unicode/invalid number tests). Budget calculator may become optional stretch or discard.

contradictions_detected.issue: Exam bank (list-comprehension, kwargs, truthiness) does not match V3 S02 skills. Truthiness is primarily S03 T1; comprehensions/kwargs are S04.
contradictions_detected.resolution: New exam slugs for 8 S02 subtopics. Deprecate or reassign existing basics concepts in PHASE 5; do not mark S02 passed with old bank.

contradictions_detected.issue: Existing content uses float for money (soles/propinas). V3 mandates Decimal for money.
contradictions_detected.resolution: T3-B teaches Decimal + quantize; propina-style examples rewritten with Decimal('0.10') not 0.10 float.

phase_0_gate.note: Lane must not set section to passed. Max phase PHASE_3.
